zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
SOL/USD短线呈窄幅震荡格局，价格在80.85附近整理，整体偏向横盘略强，市场暂未形成明确单边趋势，更多表现为低波动蓄势结构，方向选择临近关键节点。

均线方面，价格略高于SMA20(80.61)，短期均线支撑有效。MACD柱值为正，动能仍在延续，但信号线缺失，趋势确认度不足，显示多头动能尚未完全释放。

支撑位关注80.60与80.00整数关口，上方阻力在81.58前高，若有效突破将打开上行空间，下一目标或指向82.50区域，但需成交量配合确认。

操作建议以区间交易为主，未放量突破前不追多。回踩80.60附近可轻仓试多，若跌破80.00则短线趋势转弱，应及时止损并保持观望。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US dollar is currently exhibiting a narrow consolidation phase around 80.85 following a mild 0.64% daily decline. Price action remains compressed near the intraday range, suggesting reduced volatility and indecision among market participants. The broader structure appears neutral to slightly corrective after recent upside attempts, with buyers and sellers balancing near short-term equilibrium levels around the 80–82 zone.

Momentum indicators currently lean cautiously constructive despite the lack of RSI data. The MACD reading at 0.7906 remains in positive territory, indicating that underlying bullish momentum has not fully dissipated. However, absence of a signal line reading limits confirmation strength, implying potential early-stage or weakening trend continuation. Price hovering near the 20-day SMA at 80.6175 further reinforces a transitional phase between bearish pressure and recovery attempts.

From a technical structure perspective, immediate support is identified around the 20-day SMA at 80.62, which currently acts as a key pivot zone. A sustained break below this level could expose downside targets near 79.50, where prior liquidity clusters may exist. On the upside, resistance is seen at 81.58, with a stronger ceiling forming around 83.00 if momentum expands in the short term.

Trading conditions favor range-bound strategies until a decisive breakout confirms directional bias. Traders may consider accumulating near support around 80.60 with tight risk controls below 79.50, while partial profit-taking can be considered into resistance at 81.58. A break above 83.00 would strengthen bullish continuation signals, whereas failure to hold SMA support would shift bias back toward bearish momentum in the near term.
